title: Plasma Shader
desc: Animated GLSL fragment shader — rainbow plasma effect driven by time

title: Bouncing Circles
desc: Canvas animation using the draw API — colorful physics balls

title: Beat Pattern
desc: Live drum pattern using mini-notation + audio visualizer

title: Spiral Trail
desc: Lissajous-style spiral with glowing trails on the canvas

title: Reactive Ripples
desc: Beat-driven interference rings — showcases on/any/every/when event bus modifiers

title: Gaze Garden
desc: Eye-tracking brush — calibrate gaze, then paint by looking; wink to burst, blink to flash

title: Billiards
desc: Fling the cue ball to break the rack — window-scoped Canvas with pre-mapped pointer, elastic ball + rail collisions, impact-scaled sounds
